summary:
GRACE AND DIVINE REVELATIONS: Brandon explains that spiritual visions and connections with God are based on grace and relationship rather than personal works or self-righteousness. Brandon shares a past story where he accidentally stepped on and killed his daughter's puppy while playing a video game. Following the incident, his daughter prayed for the dog, and it was miraculously restored to life without injury. Brandon uses this event to emphasize that God's grace operates regardless of human perfection, teaching that giving glory to Jesus is the true trigger for divine visions.

GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES AND GREENLAND NEGOTIATIONS: Brandon recounts a vision of the Trump administration negotiating to acquire Greenland to secure valuable minerals like cobalt for battery production. In the vision, older citizens opposed the move while the younger generation supported a vote to join the United States, which would bring American commercial franchises like McDonald's, Starbucks, and Dunkin' to the territory. Brandon notes that recent news reports corroborate these negotiations, mentioning potential payouts to Greenland's residents to establish the US dollar against the BRICS nations.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND ELECTION OUTLOOK: Brandon foresees future political events, including another impeachment attempt against Trump in 2026 or 2027 that will fail because the House of Representatives will be secured. However, Brandon warns that the Senate is in jeopardy and requires focused prayer. Brandon also visualizes Elon Musk returning to prominence alongside Trump. Furthermore, Brandon predicts specific political victories, foreseeing Mike Lindell winning in Minnesota, conservative leaders maintaining control in Oklahoma and Texas, and Sarah Huckabee securing her position in Arkansas.

NATIONAL SECURITY THREATS AND DISASTERS: Brandon issues warnings regarding several impending domestic and international threats. Brandon describes a vision of a mass shooting at a Mormon church in Salt Lake City, connecting it to a forthcoming revival and split within the Mormon faith. Additionally, Brandon foresees a major attack in Seattle and natural disasters including earthquakes in Yellowstone National Park, underwater volcanoes in British Columbia, and incoming tsunamis. Brandon also warns of a biological attack orchestrated by Cuba, which will be disguised as the work of drug traffickers.

HOLLYWOOD REVIVAL AND CELEBRITY TRANSFORMATIONS: Brandon discusses an impending spiritual awakening among A-list celebrities and reality television stars in California. Brandon sees famous figures hosting private Bible studies in their mansions to avoid public distractions, experiencing phenomena similar to the biblical Acts chapter two. Brandon specifically names Chris Pratt, Mel Gibson, Justin Bieber, Kanye West, and the Kardashian family as individuals who will experience significant spiritual turnarounds and become vocal advocates for their faith.

INTERNATIONAL DEVELOPMENTS AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon details visions concerning global affairs, including a brief window for revival in Iran amidst public uprisings, and a short-lived new government in Venezuela where the United States will establish a military base. Economically, Brandon predicts XRP cryptocurrency quickly reaching five dollars and major banking deals involving figures like Garlinghouse. Brandon sees traditional banks like Bank of America, Chase, and Wells Fargo navigating turbulent financial waters while smaller banks siphon from them. BlackRock is seen standing apart, surrounded by darkness and connected to European leaders and the Canadian government. Brandon also describes a new gold rush in Colorado driven by skyrocketing gold prices.

MIDDLE EAST TRANSFORMATION AND THE THIRD TEMPLE: Brandon visualizes massive economic development in Gaza, transforming the region into a luxurious resort area resembling Miami, complete with a Trump-branded golf course. Brandon sees Mohammed bin Salman and other wealthy figures spearheading the construction of the Third Temple near the Dome. Additionally, Brandon foresees Iraq experiencing an economic boom, eliminating corruption, and utilizing its oil resources with the direct involvement of American political figures like Trump and Marco Rubio to bolster the US dollar.
rawData: [January 09, 2026]-[Greenland and the United States a major power struggle is coming concerning this]-[https://youtu.be/cbmTsV2q-Us]-[Well, good evening family. Thank you for joining us again tonight, and good morning to all of you in Australia. I don't know what time it is over there, but I like to say good morning all the time, even when it is not morning. We have a lot to talk about tonight. We have these clips Braden made for us, and he'll be adding new things to the back of the screen. He works so hard at it. I told him, 'Let's do two nights in a row of that.' He worked so hard on the prophetic mural. It's needed, even though my head's covering all of it. Well, you weren't here last night, that's why. But I'd rather have you here than that. Come get closer to me. Let's go over some of the things in the news. I want to start right off by saying this: I thought it was amazing last night because I went over everything the Lord showed us at the end of the broadcast—when it happened, how it happened, and everything. Excuse me, that's why I'm sitting. I just had greasy food. I took a bite of that bread. It wasn't until I said, 'Don't you see? I can't do anything. I don't have control of it,' and it was a flatline. It was like touching a cold stove last night. But the moment I gave Jesus the praise, the moment I acknowledged him, it switched on and I started seeing. He said, 'If you give me praise and glory and touch not the glory, touch not the anointing, every time you do this, I'll show up like that.' But last night I didn't, because I don't want to be redundant. It's like repeating things over and over again. Brandon can't do anything apart from him. Anything I see, anything that's shown to us by the spirit of God, is all because of God. I say it every single time and I'll continue to say it. Last night was a perfect example. I avoided trying to go over it, and there it was—it was a flatline. I did the whole broadcast and showed you all the things until I said, 'Well, excuse me, here we are folks.' I thought it was amazing because the moment I gave him acknowledgement, the moment I said it out of my mouth—apart from him, I can do nothing; we give all the glory to Jesus—I started seeing instantaneously. It was amazing. The broadcast went on for three hours. I said I couldn't get in the river no matter how hard I tried. Even today, whenever he took me and I was in my prayer time, he said, 'Brandon'—I said, 'What is going on? How are things going today?' just talking like I always do to him. And he said, 'Brandon, I want you to start enjoying life more. You're taking too much of this on you. I want you to have fun and enjoy life.' I said, 'I get it.' He said, 'Tell my people to have more fun. Tell my people to enjoy life more. Life's supposed to be fun and good. I gave you life, and life more abundantly.' So many people are like me—the pressure of life, the pressure of the prophetic, the pressure of all of it tries to choke the fun out of things. He said, 'I want you just to have fun. Laugh more. Enjoy your family more. You don't have to walk under the pressure of things. It's not yours to carry.' Yesterday was a prime example of it. I remember Rodney Howard-Browne telling a story—and I don't talk about names, but I remember this story. He brought it up to me where he was over at some pastor's house before the service and he was playing video games with the pastor's son. The pastor got so upset that he was not praying before the service; he was not taking it more seriously in his mind. But Rodney felt to play the game with the son, and the glory fell in that service. The bottom line is, it is in us. Regardless of whether you're having fun and enjoying life, or you're relaxing and resting, there's a point where you think it's self-righteousness that brings the glory. 'Well, it's because I fasted five times this week,' and 'It's because I put myself in position.' Not saying that doesn't help your flesh to be crucified, but if you have the mindset that it's because of what I did that got me qualified to get this, you already disqualified yourself. The Lord was showing me it's about relationship. He said, 'Brandon, it's about relationship.' Do you realize it's not about how much you think—'I didn't say anything rude today to Diana; I tried really hard to always walk in love'—when you're in a marriage and you work with somebody seven days a week, 24 hours a day, you have a tendency to be cranky and crunchy. I tell her, 'It's not about even that.' 'Well, I disqualified myself today; I had a bad attitude.' You always want to walk in love, but that's not the point. I'm trying to say that it's not how good you think you are that qualifies you for the glory. You're human, and you always lean on him. You are always leaning on and trusting in him regardless of how messed up you are. It's all about Jesus. It's just a mindset of relationship that he's been teaching me about. It's always something like, 'Well, I prayed extra long today.' We drove a lot more today and looked for stuff for our eBay store. 'You prayed a lot longer today, Brandon. Boy, I bet tonight's broadcast is going to be over the top because you prayed in tongues for six hours. I bet you're qualified tonight, buddy.' That's why the Lord told me, 'Brandon, even on your worst day, it's my grace. No matter how much you have it in your mind to think that you're qualified tonight to see and be able to do anything in the spirit realm with me, you never were good enough in the first place. It was always by my grace and by the blood.' It goes back to when I stepped on the dog and killed it. If anyone hasn't heard that before, my little girl got a dog for Christmas. Diana, I'm glad you're here; you can chime in. Don't sit over there and be quiet. I was playing Warzone, Call of Duty, with Braden for Christmas. I'm really competitive and we like to win. Braden's really good at Call of Duty. For all the religious ones out there: Oh my gosh, I can't believe... No, no, no. I have fun with my son and we play as a team. Braden wins; he's very good at Call of Duty. I'm not so good. I was really focused and wasn't paying attention, but I told Paisley to put the dog up several times. It was a brand new puppy and she had it wrapped in a blanket. I jumped up to go to the bathroom in between matches. I'm a big guy, of course, and I stepped on this puppy and killed it right there. Squashed it. The guts popped out. I mean, this is how I squashed and destroyed this dog right there. Instantaneously, Paisley is like, 'You—' because the dog is dead. I lost it. I'm cussing, acting a fool, because I'm so mad about what I just did. I'm blaming myself, but instantaneously you start blaming other people. 'It's your fault.' No, it's my fault. I was stupid. I should have watched where I was walking. But I lost my cool and started saying all kinds of profanity. I was freaking out because the dog we just bought for Christmas was dead; it had been squashed. This was years ago. I just want to clarify that this was a long time ago. You don't have to defend me; it is what it is. I was a jerk and killed the dog. I lost it. I went in the back and Paisley started screaming, 'Daddy, aren't you going to pray for my dog to rise from the dead? Daddy, don't you believe God will raise my dog from the dead?' I said, 'God's not going to hear me at all. Honey, I'm not there. I lost it. I'm just not there.' I said, 'But you pray; I can't.' She said, 'All things are possible to him who believes, Daddy. Pray for my dog to get up from the dead.' I told her I couldn't do it and that He wouldn't hear me. So she started marching up and down the hallway, screaming as loud as she could, 'All things are possible!' praying in the Holy Spirit, 'Get up from the dead, dog! Get up from the dead!' She was weeping because her dog was dead. Several hours later, Diana put the dog in a shoebox. It was frozen outside with snow on the ground, and I thought, 'I'm not going to go out there and dig a hole in that frozen ground right now.' So we put the dog in a shoebox and set it by the trash can on the front porch. I told her I'd take care of it later. Diana put the dog out there and I felt bad later. The Holy Spirit jumped all over me because I had acted like an idiot. I was broken. I went in and told her I was sorry. Paisley was still crying. I admitted I was an idiot and apologized for yelling. Then Diana went to take the trash out to the porch, and the dog was gone. She came in and said, 'Brandon, the dog is gone. Something got it.' I thought because we lived in the country, raccoons or a stray cat had taken the puppy to eat because it was cold. Then she heard a squeaking noise. Diana went down and looked, and that dog was alive. It was frozen cold, but all the guts and blood were gone. It was completely restored—no guts, no blood, nothing. That dog had been completely mushed; I had crushed the bones, but it was completely restored by the power of God. Diana brought the dog in, started blow-drying it, and got it warm. Paisley sat there with the biggest grin on her face and said, 'Daddy, I told you all things are possible to him who believes.' To this day, I'll never forget her little face, nor your face, nor Braden's face. We were all in awe of the goodness of God and the shock of what had happened. I held that dog in my hand, and God spoke to me. He said, 'Even on your best day, son, your righteousness is filthy rags. In the natural, without my Son's blood, you're never good enough.' God brought that back to me today regarding the mantle we walk in. No matter how you live your life, it's about keeping a relationship with Him and keeping the main thing the main thing, but not touching the trigger. What's God's trigger? Touching the glory. Apart from Him, Jesus said, 'I only do what my Father tells me to do.' He did not separate Himself from His Father's voice but always deflected and gave God the praise. If the Son of God always gave God the praise, we must do the same. In everything you do in word and deed, give all to the glory of God. The Bible says that in all we do and say, in word and deed, give all to the glory of God. No matter what you're going through, we give all to the glory of God; we stay on God's side. As I walked through that, the Lord reminded me—because it was around the same time of year, January—to look back at the Rolodex of miracles seen in life. You realize that even then, your righteousness is filthy rags. The point the Lord was trying to tell me was, 'Brandon, when you give me praise, it opens the door for the blessing.' When you acknowledge Him and tell people, no matter the size of your platform, that you can't do anything apart from Him, it matters. Seeing things coming in the future is a gift from Him to show us what is coming. Joel chapter 2 says that young men will see visions and old men will dream dreams. People ridicule this, but God said, 'Brandon, I'm just fulfilling what I told you I'd do in my Word. Someone has to fit the role; why not you?' My young men will have visions, my old men will dream dreams, and I'll pour out my Spirit upon my handmaidens. Whether it's Acts chapter 2 or Joel chapter 2, God is fulfilling what He said He would do in the last days. How many visions qualify? 'Visions' is plural; it doesn't mean singular. He's saying multiple. Old men will have multiple dreams. If you push into Him and give Him glory, He will show you much more to come, and it will prove accurate. It will be a sign for the world to know He is coming. The main mission for this channel is to tell His people He is coming and that it's time to repent and get serious about the Father coming. I said I'd do it. We set out to raise a prayer channel with a million prayer warriors on YouTube. By doing so, you will change the course of things. Stand strong, keep in His Word, and always deflect the glory. It's not about Brandon or Diana. I will not take His glory. Last night in the spirit, we saw Trump negotiating major deals with the Greenland people. Europe and the EU were standing strong against Trump, saying they wouldn't allow it. I saw them divided in half. The elders in Greenland did not want to join the United States, but the young people did. They were going to take a major vote to become part of the United States. The Trump administration was after minerals. I saw billions of dollars of minerals to build batteries and things like that. What else was in the dirt? I saw big dump trucks circling around; they were going down and getting the minerals. I saw fish, which I thought related to cobalt. You're still going, right? No, I want you to tell me. We'll bring our American stores to your shores. I saw American stores and big companies going to Greenland to make it like America, like we would do anywhere else. You're part of us now, so we'll share what we have. An IHOP is going to come there, or a Denny's where you can eat breakfast at night. McDonald's is probably already there. Starbucks is just around the corner on every block. I cracked myself up; it's not even funny, but it's funny to me. Dunkin' Donuts is going right next door. I saw all these major things coming. This is what we saw last night. Less than 24 hours, folks, and it happens in the news. A lot of times, when we would see things in the past before we started getting on the channel, some things would take two to three months or two to three years. He warned us about COVID before we were even on YouTube. He told us that summer that a major shaking was coming, and it started happening by March of 2019, I think. He spoke to us in 2018. He told us COVID was coming, and then he told us another virus is coming after that. Read that one right there: 'Trump admin reportedly considers paying each Greenland resident up to 100k amid US takeover talks'—that came out today. How much did I tell you they would offer them? I saw that the real agreement, whenever it really came down to it, was over $25,000 per citizen to buy their country with our US tax dollars. I saw these major things taking place last night in prayer, and it's in the news today, less than 12 hours later. People ask, 'Do you work at the news agency, Brandon? How did you know that? Do you work for the CIA?' I've heard that so much lately. 'You must be Mossad. You work for Mossad. CIA, you're an operative. I know you are. You're part of the Masonics, part of that 666 stuff with the witchcraft.' Come on, folks. I'm a Holy Ghost believer, baptized in the Holy Ghost, praying in the Holy Ghost. I'm not CIA. I don't work for Mossad. It's Jesus. Isn't he wonderful? That's all I can say to your ignorance. Read this one right here: 'US considering investing in critical minerals mining in Greenland, Ammaroq CEO tells CNBC.' That happened today. What did Brandon say? What did the Holy Ghost say they were after? I saw major mining, and it was going to establish the dollar against the BRICS. All this is to combat the BRICS. The dollar is in trouble. As you see behind us on the screen, the dollar is in trouble and it's about to go over the waterfall. Trump is paddling as fast as he can; he's canoeing and fighting to keep our economy up. The Lord said, 'Pray for him,' for I heard impeachment will come again in 2026 or 2027. They'll say it a lot, but they'll not have the votes because we'll keep the House. The Lord said the Senate is in jeopardy. You have a great opportunity to lose the Senate. I saw them losing the Senate in November, and the Lord said you must pray to keep it. There are key races in key places where intercessory prayer will have great influence. We're going to continue to pray that we get the Senate and the House so that Trump doesn't have a stalemate presidency. Behind us, I saw Elon Musk coming back on the scene. The bromance is back. Elon's back. Trump's back. I knew he was coming back. I told everybody how many times? I got detailed about what I saw concerning that man with the rockets. Where did SpaceX come from? Who does he have a covenant with? The Lord said, 'Who did he have a relationship with for his first rocket?' If you look at the trail at the beginning, you'll find it was cheaper to go to another country. That country gave him the ability to do what he's doing right now, which translated to America. But it all started somewhere. What lies beneath the surface? The Lord warned us to pray about these things. He keeps warning us about Cuba. This is a prayer fail that happened last night. Play the video. Regarding the church in Salt Lake City, they say you're derogatory, but I'm trying to tell you that you're going to be targeted. You need to pray over the main Mormon base in Utah. I saw mass casualties coming. I see Salt Lake City; it's the area for the Mormons. I see an attack concerning certain landmarks represented in 2026. There's something about Utah that is highlighted. It goes clear up into Seattle; I'm talking mass events. A deadly mass shooting in Salt Lake City and the hunt for whoever pulled the trigger—two people killed, eight shot, three in critical condition at a funeral at an LDS church along Redwood Road. I said the Mormon church in Salt Lake City. The more I flow in this, the greater detail in the vision, the greater the threat. If it's bold and very clear, it's very prominent. This is a very serious situation at hand. When it's faded and not as detailed or vibrant, it's not coming as quick. It's not a heightened alert that I want. I don't want to say it's not coming as quick; it's just not heightened as much. This is serious. You need to really pray. The more vibrant the colors, the more things I see. This is something that's very hot. Did I describe that well enough? You understand what I'm saying? Well, you're married to me, but you get it because I'm trying, and you know what I'm saying all the time. The greater the vision, the greater the detail, the greater the prayer. More imminent. More imminent. There you go. Thank you for the word. So I try to tell everybody it's very close. And then how many days later? November 13th, I see this. Today's the 7th of January and it happened. And the Lord says there's more to come. Now I don't know how—is it open doors or whatever? But the Lord says, 'Pray for the Mormon church in this time frame.' Do I follow their false doctrine? Yes. I'm not here to attack any religion or denomination, but I have to tell you the truth. What I know is false doctrine. And the Lord said, 'I'm bringing a great revival to the Mormon church, and I'm going to shake the Mormon church. In doing so, I'm going to show up, and there's going to be a splitting of the Mormon church. You're going to see a major split but a major revival happen in the midst of it, for there are really good people there.' That's why I said I'm not trying to be derogatory; that was what that was about because I said it's false, but the Lord said, 'I'm going to shake the Mormon church and there's going to be a major revival there.' So Braden makes those shorts and I try to tell you what is happening. What I was saying about it before, number two, what I see in Seattle: another major attack's coming. I saw it all over the place. The Lord showed me. And so we saw a major earthquake taking place there. We saw Yellowstone going off. We've seen major earthquakes in Yellowstone National Park. In British Columbia, we saw volcanoes going off in the water. We saw major tsunami waves coming in when we've seen Cuba plotting a plan to attack us with some kind of biological thing in the days ahead and make it look like it's drug traffickers. They'll use drug traffickers as the cover of this. It's not drug traffickers; it's Cuba. It's the government. Watch what happens. This is one that's encouraging. Now, I try to give you both sides of the coin all the time, what the Holy Ghost is talking to us about. I give all the glory to God for this. But play the video. I took my vest off last night because I felt so hot when I was wearing it. Am I crowding you? I'm sorry. I take so much room. Go ahead and play what the Lord said was coming to California. Now, this is January 16th of 2025. Pretty neat, huh? That's almost a year ago. But look at what the Lord said January 16th of 2025 and see where we are right now. I saw pop stars—major name pop stars—that all of a sudden are going to get radically changed, and some of them really will. There will be a great shifting in celebrity people. Reality TV people are going to become radically born again. I saw them having small groups in their houses—mega houses—with all kinds of celebrities coming to these mega houses and getting the word of God because they couldn't go to a church because it's too much of a distraction. So I saw them having Bible studies in the privacy of their homes because they couldn't go to churches because of their names, because people were trying to mess with them. But they were truly hungry and looking for Jesus. And when this happens, they will sit in these Bible studies and I saw the presence of the Lord just like it was in Acts chapter 2 when the mighty rushing wind will come in and it will fill their house. You will see Holy Ghost fire on these homes. And when the Holy Ghost fire comes on these homes, you're going to see a radical transformation for some. It's coming. A major move of the presence of God is coming on some homes in the Hollywood Hills. I saw it. It's going to happen quickly and suddenly. But not every single celebrity that you hear is going to get radically saved in this time frame is one that you can listen to. Just because they proclaim it—let's see the fruit. The fruit will demonstrate the word of God. The word and the fruit will go hand in hand. Great celebrities you will see will come to their knees and they will worship me, for I've come to set the captives free. I hear him say great celebrities will go to their knees and there will be repentance within them. I see a great move of the spirit of God upon Hollywood with A-list celebrities. I'm talking supernatural. It's like a great metamorphosis will take place in some of these celebrities. I see Chris—he's a born-again Christian. Chris Pratt, the Guardians of the Galaxy guy. He gets radical. I see this man on fire on another level for Jesus. I hear the spirit of the Lord say, 'Watch Mel Gibson, for a great move of my presence will come. Pray for Mel Gibson with this new Passion of the Christ movie.' I'm going to visit Hollywood and you'll see A-list celebrities. I see a shaking in the family. All of them. I see a great awakening in them, for it stems back to their generations, Armenian. A great revival within them, a shaking in them. There will be great mouthpieces: Kim, Khloe, Kendall, and Kylie. I see a turnaround in the Kardashians, a great revival within them. I see a revival in Kanye again. I see a revival stirring up within them and they will be a great mouthpiece, and you've got to pray for them. You must pray for them. I see a revival. God's going to use them and Bieber. They're all connected there. I see great strongholds of satanic things to hold them, but I see a revival coming to Hollywood. Great celebrity influence will help things turn more red and people have had enough. They'll have major gatherings in these celebrity mansions as a place of privacy as a revival will break out. A shaking's coming. They'll be key figures and mouthpieces, and they'll use their mansions for gathering places, and the Holy Spirit will move in these gathering places. But the Lord showed us major... play the other clip. Now you've got this—this is Khloe saying this a couple of days ago. Now I don't endorse everything this woman says, but this is who we've been praying for and I thought it was pretty cool what she says here. It's a beginning. First the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation. We're seeing first the blade right now, so we've got to pray for that blade. But look at what she said on her podcast: 'I believe in God and that Jesus is the son of God.' And that's my belief system. I love talking to God multiple times throughout my day. The power of prayer is so real and so strong. I know because I have so much faith. I've helped so many people. This sounds crazy, but when people are like, 'Pray for me. I know you have a line to God,' I'm like, 'I do. I genuinely do.' I've prayed for so many people through surgeries, and I know my prayers when Lamar was in his coma were heard by God. There's just no other way. My faith does not waver. I know he hears me, and I'm going to pray until the cows come home or until Jesus comes back. Whichever one, I'm a child of God and I believe. You got it. Now, that's pretty cool. I thought, 'It's happening.' Now, watch this one. Why don't you talk about your faith and how much faith plays a part in your life? I feel like people are always surprised. They'll be like, 'What, you're witches?' 'Yeah, you know, I get that all the time. Believe in God.' When I talk about reading the Bible every day, people are like, 'Yeah, you do.' I have a daily devotional that I read. I've been trying to ask some of our friends that live near us to do a Bible study, which I think would be amazing for the adults. I would love it. I told you that I want to do it with you. And I'm going to try that new church. I think the more you talk to God, the louder you'll start hearing him. Because at first you're like, 'Well, okay.' It's so awkward or weird or just foreign to you. But then the more that you talk to him, those answers do show up or innately you find the answer. You figure it out. That's how he speaks to you. I just thought it was pretty neat talking about having Bible studies in their houses. I thought it was out of a lot of prayer. And it's amazing when you start seeing fruit of your prayer in people's lives. You don't even know these people, but the Lord says, 'I want to use them. I want them to be a major mouthpiece for me in these last days, Braden, to bring in great harvest for young people.' Now, do we just take our guard down and say everything's—no. We keep continuing to pray. We're not judging them. We're excited that they're on the right road. They're allowing Jesus to do something in their life. And we all started out as babies. Remember what the Lord said: 'Be patient with my babies, church, for you were once a baby. Don't become critical. Love my babies.' You need to keep praying for them. They may do this photoshoot and they might do that, and it's repulsive to some non-believers. But I'm just saying, listen, we're on the right road. At least we got some traction here. Look at what God's doing. Let's get excited about the end times, church. I got excited when my wife showed me that today. I said, 'Wow, babe. That's prayer.' And we gave this word back this time last year. The Lord said, 'I'm going to do something with the Kardashians,' and I thought it was pretty neat. Was there anything else? Iran. So then we saw a major uprising in Iran and we continue to see this, and we need to pray for their safety. But as we have prayed into it, the Lord showed us a major revival coming to Iran, and it would be a window of opportunity. Then last night we saw Venezuela, and I saw them rising up a new government and it would be short-lived because they had a barrier in their mind of how they do things. I saw the United States of America setting up a military base in Venezuela. A massive town will be set up in Venezuela in the days ahead. It was painted red to me in the vision. I saw a military base with all kinds of military equipment and the United States occupying that area, and it was like a small city. Then I saw that because when you are oppressed, it's a way of thinking. The Lord showed me because it has been that way for decades, it would take that generation dying off to think free because they will bring in another leader that will be just like Maduro because that's the way they think. It wasn't just getting rid of him; it was levels of government, layers like an onion full of corruption and witchcraft. That was layer after layer. And that's why he said, 'Brandon, I told you once the liberation takes place, you have a small window.' That was by design. Same thing about North Korea, same thing about China. These areas that the Lord said, 'I'm going to give you a window of opportunity to reach these people.' I thought, 'Well, that window's small.' 'I'm not giving you a door. I'm giving you a window.' We have all kinds of people watching us and you go, "Wow, that's interesting. The devil's crowd wants us to come on their channels." I thought about doing it and telling them about Jesus, but the Lord said no. I thought, "Well, I'll go over there and tell them about Jesus because they're all going to hell." But I thought, "Isn't that interesting?" We've got all kinds of psychics and mediums and people talking to devils, and they all say, 'We want to know how you're doing it.' It's Jesus. That's how we do it. Jesus helps us. It's not Brandon Biggs. And that's why I think it's interesting because everybody wants to know. They had a huge channel, too, didn't they? They come over here and talk, 'We want to interview you.' People are searching. I'm like, 'No, I'm not going to go talk on the devil's witchcraft channel because then people think I'm condoning it.' No, I'm just trying to tell them they need to get Jesus. They don't know. People are hungry. We get all kinds of people like that—mediums in California, mediums all the time asking, 'Come out to celebrities. We want to talk to you.' All glory to Jesus. All hail, King Jesus. And I don't take anybody's invitations, really. I get invited to do things, but we really don't, do we? We just keep doing our thing unless the Holy Spirit tells us to. The only one I really like was Kim Clement's daughter, Donné. She is really nice. She was really nice. I love my friend Billy: Billy Burke and Billye Brim, my BBs. But we don't do a lot, do we? We kind of just do our thing. Praying in here is a lot—the emails and all the stuff we get by the time we get through our day. I'm like, 'How?' because Joseph and they all travel all over the United States of America. And I'm like, 'How in the world do they do that?' They have to have huge staffs because, between that, we're exhausted by the time we get our day done. And now Joseph goes to all these places, and I say, 'Man,' and he's refreshed. A lot of times I talk to him on the phone, and he's not run down. He doesn't look like he's whipped. It's very interesting to me. I just stay in my vein, stay on my thing. But I'm so thankful that you show up and pray with us. It's fine. We love you. We'll be back. What is tomorrow? Friday. Yep, I'll be back tomorrow, Friday. We'll pray with you again. I'll try to come on earlier. I know it's late and there's a lot of you that are like, 'I have to go do things. I don't have time to be up that late and burning the midnight oil.' Yeah, it's the time when we're done feeding Megan and doing all the things we do after we give her dinner. I don't mind praying at night, but a lot of people don't. It's after I feed Megan and we do all that we do. I'm like, 'Man,' because it's a lot, getting her settled and getting her around so we can pray. Got to make sure she's full. But we love you. Remember, put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. We love you. We'll see you again tomorrow. Bye-bye.]
